texto: My husband would not give me an opportunity for worship. That was his greatness. They are cowards who claim absolute devotion from their wives as their right
autor: that is a humiliation for both.
explicacao: Citação de that is a humiliation for both. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “My husband would not give me an opportunity for worship. That was his greatness. They are cowards…” articula reflexao, rabindranath-tagore, the-home-and-the-world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-home-and-the-world.
